---
title: "Figure 2"
author: "Luciano Moffatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
```

```{r}

filenames=c(
  "data/figure_2_dlikelihood_predictions_MRV",
  "data/figure_2_dlikelihood_predictions_IRV",
  "data/figure_2_dlikelihood_predictions_MRV2",
  "data/figure_2_dlikelihood_predictions_IRV2"
  
)

algorithms=c("MRV"
             ,"IRV"
             ,"MRV"
             ,"IRV"
             )

schemes=c("scheme_CO","scheme_CO","scheme_CCO","scheme_CCO")
```


```{r}

d=data.frame()
for (i in 1:length(filenames)){
  
  d0=read.csv(paste0(filenames[i],".csv"))
  d0$algo=algorithms[i]
  d0$scheme=schemes[i]
  
  d=rbind(d,d0)
}

```

```{r}
library(dplyr)

result <- d %>%filter()%>%
  group_by(
    algo,scheme,row_kind, n_step, sub_step, step_start, step_end, 
    step_middle, agonist, component, param_index, 
    param_col, param_name
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    across(
      everything(), 
      list(
        mean = ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
        se   = ~ sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(sum(!is.na(.x))),
        n= ~ sum(!is.na(.x))
      ),
      .names = "{.col}_{.fn}"
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
result%>%filter(row_kind=="derivative")%>%select(-param_index,-param_col)%>%pivot_wider(values_from = c(primitive_mean,primitive_se,derivative_value_mean,derivative_value_se), names_from = c(component,param_name))->dd
```


```{r, fig.width=180/24.5, fig.height=270/24.5}
(
result%>%filter(scheme=="scheme_CO", row_kind=="derivative")%>%ggplot()+geom_point(aes(x=step_middle,y=primitive_mean))+geom_linerange(aes(x=step_middle,y=primitive_mean, ymin = primitive_mean-primitive_se,ymax=primitive_mean+primitive_se))+facet_wrap(component~algo, scales = "free")
  
)/
(
result%>%filter(scheme=="scheme_CO",component=="logL", row_kind=="derivative")%>%ggplot()+geom_point(aes(x=step_middle,y=derivative_value_mean))+geom_linerange(aes(x=step_middle,y=derivative_value_mean, ymin = derivative_value_mean-derivative_value_se,ymax=derivative_value_mean+derivative_value_se))+facet_wrap(param_name~algo, scales = "free"))

```


```{r, fig.width=180/24.5, fig.height=270/24.5}
(
result%>%filter(scheme=="scheme_CCO", row_kind=="derivative")%>%ggplot()+geom_point(aes(x=step_middle,y=primitive_mean))+geom_linerange(aes(x=step_middle,y=primitive_mean, ymin = primitive_mean-primitive_se,ymax=primitive_mean+primitive_se))+facet_wrap(component~algo, scales = "free")
  
)/
(
result%>%filter(scheme=="scheme_CCO",component=="logL", row_kind=="derivative")%>%ggplot()+geom_point(aes(x=step_middle,y=derivative_value_mean))+geom_linerange(aes(x=step_middle,y=derivative_value_mean, ymin = derivative_value_mean-derivative_value_se,ymax=derivative_value_mean+derivative_value_se))+facet_wrap(param_name~algo, scales = "free"))

```

```{r}
result%>%filter(row_kind%in%c("state_value"), scheme=="scheme_CO")%>%select(algo,scheme,row_kind,component,primitive_mean,primitive_se,primitive_n)%>%View()
```
